findings.description: The knowledge file introduces the section label `**[復路処理]**` for the section containing step 5 (正常終了), but this text does not exist in the source. The source RST reads `**[往路処理]**` for that section (with RST anchor `.. _outbound:`). The text "復路処理" is nowhere in the source file.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `.. _outbound:` followed by `**[往路処理]**` / `**5. (正常終了)**` — the label in the source is literally 往路処理, not 復路処理.

findings.description: `MultiThreadExecutionHandler` appears in the handler queue (Main → MultiThreadExecutionHandler → …) described in s1 content but is absent from the s1 hints list.
findings.source_evidence: Source 概要 section handler queue: `"MultiThreadExecutionHandler"` is one of the queue entries.

findings.description: `MultiThreadExecutionHandler` and `TransactionManagementHandler` both appear prominently in s2 content (steps 1, 2, 6, 6a) but are absent from the s2 hints list.
findings.source_evidence: Source ハンドラ処理フロー section: step 1 and 2 reference MultiThreadExecutionHandler; steps 6 and 6a reference TransactionManagementHandler.
